// Bordered & Pulled // ------------------------- .#{$fa-css-prefix}-border { padding: .2em .25em .15em; border: solid .08em $fa-border-color; border-radius: .1em; } .#{$fa-css-prefix}-pull-left { float: left; } .#{$fa-css-prefix}-pull-right { float: right; } .#{$fa-css-prefix} { &.#{$fa-css-prefix}-pull-left { margin-right: .3em; } &.#{$fa-css-prefix}-pull-right { margin-left: .3em; } } /* Deprecated as of 4.4.0 */ .pull-right { float: right; } .pull-left { float: left; } .#{$fa-css-prefix} { &.pull-left { margin-right: .3em; } &.pull-right { margin-left: .3em; } }
